simple_types.name: CTRLA_MODESelect
simple_types.code:
type CTRLA_MODESelect is
   DEVICE,
   HOST)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: CTRLB_LPMHDSKSelect
simple_types.code:
type CTRLB_LPMHDSKSelect is
   NO,
   ACK,
   NYET,
   STALL)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: CTRLB_SPDCONFSelect
simple_types.code:
type CTRLB_SPDCONFSelect is
   FS,
   LS,
   HS,
   HSTM)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: HS
enumeration_literals.description: HSTM: High Speed Test Mode (force high-speed mode for test mode)

simple_types.name: CTRLB_SPDCONFSelect_1
simple_types.code:
type CTRLB_SPDCONFSelect_1 is
   NORMAL,
   FS)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: NORMAL
enumeration_literals.description:
Full-speed: the host remains in full-speed mode whatever is the peripheral
speed capability. Relevant in UTMI mode only.

simple_types.name: FSMSTATUS_FSMSTATESelect
simple_types.code:
type FSMSTATUS_FSMSTATESelect is
   OFF,
   ON,
   SUSPEND,
   SLEEP,
   DNRESUME,
   UPRESUME,
   RESET)
  with Size => 7;

enumeration_literals.name: OFF
enumeration_literals.description: ON (L0). It corresponds to the Idle and Active states

simple_types.name: STATUS_LINESTATESelect
simple_types.code:
type STATUS_LINESTATESelect is
   Val_0,
   Val_1,
   Val_2)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: STATUS_SPEEDSelect
simple_types.code:
type STATUS_SPEEDSelect is
   FS,
   LS,
   HS)
  with Size => 2;

array_types.name: USB_DEVICE_ENDPOINT_Clusters
array_types.code:
type USB_DEVICE_ENDPOINT_Clusters is array (0 .. 7)
  of USB_DEVICE_ENDPOINT_Cluster;

type USB_PINTSMRY_USB_HOST_EPINT_Field_Array is array (0 .. 7) of Boolean
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 8;
